Name: Athenians
History: Athens, the cradle of democracy and philosophy, rose to become the dominant naval and cultural power of the Greek world during the Golden Age (490-323 BC). Under leaders like Pericles, the city built the Parthenon, fostered the arts, and led the Delian League against Persian aggression.

CivBonuses.Name: Civic Duty
CivBonuses.History: Athenian citizens were expected to serve the polis as soldiers, jurors, and laborers alike.

Factions.Name: Athenians
Factions.Description: The democratic city-state of Athens, cultural and naval power of the Classical Greek world.
